reviews.comment:
Los playeros son amables pero muy lentos esa ordenanza de hacer la fila de ese modo no me parece apropiada. Estuve el otro día, para poner aire a los neumáticos y todavía no lo habían arreglado, no sé cuánto tiempo ya hace que no funciona.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are friendly, but very slow. I don't think this ordinance requiring you to line up like that is appropriate. I was there the other day to put air in my tires, and they still hadn't fixed it. I don't know how long it's been since it was broken.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzb2ZLU3lRRRAB
